title: pyrola picta subsp. dentata
intro: Pyrola picta subsp. dentata, also known as wintergreen or mountain wintergreen, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of methyl salicylate, a compound similar to aspirin, which has analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pyrola picta subsp. dentata include relief from headaches, fever reduction, and pain relief, as well as potential benefits for digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Pyrola picta subsp. dentata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
